limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied to AI investment appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4/5 due to absence of quantification.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (merchandising, planning, inventory, personalization, Precision Plus) but no quantified business results (e.g., % improvement, $ impact) were present in the excerpts.

Risk disclosure scored 4 because multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are described (reputational harm from inaccurate GenAI outputs, AI-enhanced cyberattacks, workforce skills disruption, third-party GenAI service dependency) with operational impact pathways, but no quantified risk treatment or named governance body was found in the excerpts.
